goals.title: Ship and package the agent playbook for Codex, Claude Code, Cursor/ge...
goals.objective: Ship and package the agent playbook for Codex, Claude Code, Cursor/generic agents, and terminal workflows. Update README/package docs map as needed.
goals.evidence: Shipped and packaged the agent playbook through commits b67e93d and ba98102. docs/agent-playbook.md covers Codex, Claude Code, Cursor/generic IDE agents, terminal usage, runtime-first rule, capture->critique->fix->recapture->verify, sample smoke vs private dogfood, and placeholder-only dogfood commands. README docs map and package.json files include it. CI 27164314674 passed on Node 20 and 24.

goals.title: Polish the Screenslop skill/reference docs so agents know the runtime...
goals.objective: Polish the Screenslop skill/reference docs so agents know the runtime-first contract, fresh-bundle verify rule, and private dogfood gate without overclaiming fallback capture.
goals.evidence: Polished Screenslop skill/reference docs in commit 573d662. skills/screenslop/SKILL.md now points to docs/agent-playbook.md plus compact agent-contract and dogfood references; it keeps the runtime-first rule, fresh-bundle verify rule, and no overclaim for non-Baguette capture fallback.

goals.title: Add/validate the dogfood redaction checker, contract tests, and packa...
goals.objective: Add/validate the dogfood redaction checker, contract tests, and package-smoke coverage.
goals.evidence: Added and validated dogfood redaction checks through commits c230345, 49eff17, and 573d662. check-dogfood-redaction is packaged, package smoke runs redaction tests, docs/release-checklist.md documents the checker, contract tests cover the agent playbook, and the checker emits placeholder issue values instead of raw private paths. Verification passed locally: cleanup dry-run, doctor, npm test 103/103, smoke:e2e fixed, matrix dry-run/profile, npm pack --dry-run, and smoke:package.

goals.title: Run private real-app dogfood preflight/full smoke if .screenslop/conf...
goals.objective: Run private real-app dogfood preflight/full smoke if .screenslop/config.json exists; otherwise record recorded-blocker with redacted preflight evidence and keep Studio blocked.
goals.evidence: Recorded private dogfood blocker instead of claiming sample proof. .screenslop/config.json is missing. Documented preflight command exited 1 with reason target-config-invalid, failedStage target-config, all capture/fix/fresh/verify stages not-run, and pathDisplayMode redacted. check-dogfood-redaction passed against /tmp/screenslop-private-preflight.json with HOME, /Volumes/MyEXT, and selector strings forbidden. Studio remains blocked until a real configured app reaches verified-fixed.

goals.objective: Run final verification, review, commit, push, and checkpoint durable evidence.
